zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter於1222年出生在英國貝德福爾時，他的父親Odonius le Caretier23歲，母親Sabina Atte Bourns22歲。他於1245年與Amicia在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德結婚。他去世於1278年在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾布申亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter于1222年出生在英国貝德福爾时，他的父亲Odonius le Caretier23岁，母亲Sabina Atte Bourns22岁。他于1245年与Amicia在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德结婚。他去世于1278年在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾布申亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Charetter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Emile, Marcel, Adrien, Andre, Alban, Armand, Fernand, Gilles, Normand, Pierre, Adelard.

French Canadian: variant of Charest 2. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Cart 4, Carte 3, Charrette 1, Sharette , Sharrett , Shaurette , and Shorette .

In some cases possibly also French: from Old French char(r)ete ‘small cart’, a diminutive of char ‘cart, carriage’ (see Char ), probably acquired as a metonymic occupational name for a user or maker of carts. Compare Chachere .

variants.name: Charest
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Jacques, Marcel, Normand, Andre, Andree, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Michel, Rosaire.
Altered form of French Charet: from Old French charet ‘cart’, used as a nickname for a carter.
Altered form of French Canadian   Chauret  . Compare   Cart   4,   Carte   3, and   Charette   1.

variants.name: Chachere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Celestine, Laure.
American French: from Chacheré, a combination of the beginning of the French surname Charette 2 and the ending of the French surname Vaucheré, a derivative of Vaucher, a cognate of Gaucher 1.

History: It was Louis-Dominique Charette from Paris, France, who created his new surname from the beginning of his own surname and the ending of the maiden name of his wife, Catherine Vaucheré (or Vaucherey, Vaucherez). They married in St. Landry Parish, LA, c. 1787.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter was born in 1222, in Bedfordshire, England, his father, Odonius le Caretier, was 23 and his mother, Sabina Atte Bourns, was 22. He married Amicia in 1245, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1278, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Bushmead, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter est né en 1222, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Odonius le Caretier, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sabina Atte Bourns, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Amicia en 1245, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1278, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Bushmead, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter 1222 in Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Odonius le Caretier 23 und seine Mutter Sabina Atte Bourns 22. Er hat 1245 in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Amicia geheiratet. Er starb 1278 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bushmead, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter è nato il nel 1222 nel Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Odonius le Caretier, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Sabina Atte Bourns, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Amicia nel 1245, nel Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1278, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Bushmead, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetterが1222年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Odonius le Caretierは23歳，母Sabina Atte Bournsは22歳であった。1245年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードでAmiciaと結婚した。彼は1278年に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアブシュメアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter(이)가 1222년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Odonius le Caretier(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Sabina Atte Bourns(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 Amicia(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1278년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 부스h미드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter nasceu em 1222, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Odonius le Caretier, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sabina Atte Bourns, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicia em 1245, em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1278, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Bushmead, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter родился в 1222 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Odonius le Caretier было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sabina Atte Bourns, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia в 1245 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1278 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности бушмид, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter nació en 1222, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Odonius le Caretier, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sabina Atte Bourns, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Amicia en 1245, en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1278, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Bushmead, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
